remarks: Welcome to a one-of-a-kind home in the heart of Westport - where timeless Colonial charm meets the elegance of a Parisian Estate. Set on an acre+ this home offers sophistication, space, and serenity throughout. The light-filled LR stuns with vaulted ceilings, HW floors, a wood-burning fireplace, and French doors opening directly to the deck and pool - the perfect setting for everyday living or entertaining. The formal DR offers its own fireplace, blending classic character with warmth and style. The chef's kitchen features two iconic AGA stoves, a walk-in pantry, skylights and a large center island. A charming covered porch offers peaceful morning coffee or evening outdoor dining. Upstairs, the primary suite, is a private sanctuary with vaulted ceilings, sunny sitting room, HW floors, walk-in closet, and spa-like bath incl cast iron soaking tub, oversized shower and elegant finishes. Add'l bedrooms 1 en suite the other w hall bath on the 2nd floor and 2 more Bedrooms on the 3rd floor w Hall Bath are bright and spacious, each w/ HW floors and serene views of the pool and gardens. The LL offers gym area, work space, storage and access to 2 car garage. The fully fenced backyard is a private paradise. Stone walls, mature English gardens and spectacular In-ground pool with auto cover add to the magic of this private oasis. Whole House Generator. Minutes to schools, shopping and town offering the rare combination of luxury, charm, privacy and convenience.
